userStories.title: Live canvas preview of text overlay
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user, I want the `CoolTextOverlay` node to show a canvas preview with the text rendered over the video frame so that I can adjust position, size, and style without running the full workflow.

The canvas dimensions match the connected VIDEO frame's aspect ratio; it scales to fit the

userStories.title: pretext integration for accurate rich inline layout
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI developer, I want the frontend to use pretext's `prepareRichInline()` API to measure fragment widths so that the canvas preview matches the Pillow backend output in fragment positioning and line width.

userStories.title: Fragment editor UI in node widget
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user, I want to add, remove, and edit styled text fragments directly in the node so that I can build composite labels without manually writing JSON.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The node widget area shows a list of fragment rows; each row has inputs for `text` (text
An "Add fragment" button appends a new row with default values inherited from the node-level
A "Remove" button on each row deletes that fragment; at least one fragment must remain (the
Editing any fragment field immediately serialises the fragment list to JSON and writes it
The canvas preview updates to reflect fragment edits in real time (covered by US-001 AC).

userStories.title: Graceful degradation when pretext unavailable
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user on a network-restricted environment, I want the canvas preview to still render text so that the node is usable even if pretext fails to load.
